title: Strongthium 3/16 Fuel Line Hose Set with 10 Pieces Clamps Rubber Gas Tube for ATV Go-carts Mini Bikes 196cc 212cc 6.5hp 5.5hp 8hp 9hp 11hp 13hp Small Engines Generators
features: For transfer of petroleum products fuel lines vapor emission, for generators, small engines, mini bikes, go karts, water pump, air compressor, log splitter, lawn mowers snow blowers and many other machines.
Fuel line: 3/16 inch(4.9mm) inside diameter and 11/32 inch(8.9mm) outside diameter. Hose Clamps are for the hose specically.
The gas lines are oil resistant,cold-resistant and ethanol tolerance. Custom 6.6 ft Length (2m) can be cut to size for most of your applications.
For gasoline, E-85, diesel, and bio-diesel, fuels in riding tractors snow mobiles dirt bikes ATVs UTVs and just about all small engines powersports equipments.
Package includes:6.6 Feet (2.0m) 3/16" ID Fuel Line, 10X Hose Clamps
